wordplay_note: A boss whose messages intrude from the land of the living into half-life
card_description: Glen Runciter (meaning "Runciter echoes runcible (nonsensical)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Head of Runciter Associates whose death/survival is ambiguous throughout the novel. Name note: A boss whose messages intrude from the land of the living into half-life. Authority figure whose reality status is perpetually uncertain. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Head of Runciter Associates whose death/survival is ambiguous throughout the novel
reference.significance: Authority figure whose reality status is perpetually uncertain
